rulings.Case Title: EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC, ET AL VS. NIKOLAY SHULGIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Shulgin Acquisition Group, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay And To Compel Arbitration.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 29, 2020 line 6. Defendant Shulgin Acquisition Group, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay And To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. This action shall proceed to arbitration as to all parties. The action is not dismissed at this time. Parties may file their respective petitions to confirm/vacate arbitration award in this action at the conclusion of the arbitration proceeding. =(501/CFH)
